name: Fried Rice with Basil (Khao Pad Krapow)
recipeIngredient: 3 small Fresh red or green chilis OR French/snap beans-- cut into 1/2 inch pieces
recipeInstructions:
1. In a wok or frying pan, heat oil over medium heat until shimmering.
2. Add garlic and chilis; cook 1 minute until fragrant and garlic turns golden brown.
3. Add mushrooms and onions; stir-fry for 30 seconds.
4. Stir in cooked rice, cooking until well combined.
5. Add long beans, peppers, sugar, and soy sauce; continue stirring until incorporated.
6. At the last second, quickly toss in basil leaves, then transfer to a serving dish and serve immediately.
